description: Process the Sentinel-2 image at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif to isolate agricultural fields. Create a vector data container named 'field_boundaries' containing at least two polygons representing distinct fields. Produce a new band named 'masked_field_data' where pixels from 'band_1' are preserved within the polygons and set to 0 elsewhere. Save the enriched product as a BEAM-DIMAP file to /home/ga/snap_projects/field_extraction.dim, export the vector geometries as an ESRI Shapefile to /home/ga/snap_exports/fields.shp, and export the final masked product as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/field_extraction.tif.
